headline: Consolidated Edison Inc (NYSE:ED) Q1 2026 Earnings: GAAP Beat Fails to Mask Revenue and Adjusted EPS Miss
summary: Con Edison's Q1 2026 earnings beat GAAP net income but missed revenue and adjusted EPS estimates, with the stock unchanged after hours amid ongoing strategic portfolio review.
